message:
refactor(embed): expand fastembed and model2vec embedders with batch processing and error recovery

Refactor the embedding subsystem to improve batch processing throughput
and error resilience across all embedder implementations.

- fastembed_embedder.rs: Major refactor (+190/-60) adding batched
  embedding with configurable chunk sizes, retry logic for transient
  failures, and model warm-up validation
- model2vec_embedder.rs: Refactor (+109/-40) with improved model
  loading, dimension validation, and batch coalescing
- hash_embedder.rs: Expand with 42 new lines of SimHash/MinHash
  configuration and normalization helpers
- embedder.rs: Adjust trait bounds for new batch API
- hybrid.rs: Update hybrid search pipeline for new embedder signatures
- reranker.rs: Align reranker with updated scoring types

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -351,7 +351,7 @@ pub fn rrf_fuse<'a>(
 #[must_use]
 #[cfg(feature = "frankensearch-migration")]
 pub fn candidate_count(limit: usize, offset: usize) -> usize {
-    frankensearch_fusion::candidate_count(limit, offset)
+    frankensearch_fusion::candidate_count(limit, offset, CANDIDATE_MULTIPLIER)
 }
 
 #[must_use]
